array.string:
LOGDIR="$HOME/.claude/logs" mkdir -p "$LOGDIR"
# Sync CLAUDE.md to AGENTS.md (project root) CLAUDE_SRC="$HOME/.claude/CLAUDE.md" AGENTS_DST="$HOME/AGENTS.md"
if [ -f "$CLAUDE_SRC" ]; then cp "$CLAUDE_SRC" "$AGENTS_DST" 2>/dev/null echo "[$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)] Synced CLAUDE.md → AGENTS.md" >> "$LOGDIR/launchd-sync.log" else echo "[$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)] WARNING: Source not found: $CLAUDE_SRC" >> "$LOGDIR/launchd-sync.log" fi
